what_it_does: A branch-merge research report (read 2026-06-08) that corrects a prior inventory and documents what two now-merged branches (concurrent-cognition at 233f34e, interactive-surface-build at e1063f7) added to and changed on unified main. It enumerates the new files, the contract-level seam changes, the X1-X17 + L-series staged delivery, the new SSE/route surfaces, the three corpus layers, the still-unmerged operable-interface-build worktree, and a punch-list of what the design pack must add or document, headlined by the pending mode-dial unification.
observations: Opens with an explicit correction to inv-E-angles.md: both branches previously 'not merged' are now MERGED; unified main is ground truth
Status table of all four branches (concurrent-cognition, interactive-surface-build, night-build, overnight-20260605) with prior vs actual status

Angle 1 details concurrent-cognition: new runtime files (cognition.py, roles.py, rules.py, activation.py, authoring.py), contracts/cognition_info.py, 8 role files, CognitionView.tsx FE region, a cognition.* SSE event branch, 2 new CONFIRM-class governance verbs, 13 new test files

Documents 5 shared-seam CHANGES from cognition: the mode dial built twice (MODE_SPECS vs THOUGHT_SHAPES on same 8 modes), thread-scoped chat feed fix, voice clean_fn per-part granularity, self-mod audit ledger restructure, latent FE capabilities now consumed by CognitionView
Angle 2 details interactive-surface-build X1-X17: the address→scope→build chain, blast_radius, codeedges.py, semantic vector index, R2 ranking knobs; plus L1-L10 wires; 15 new test files

Documents 5 seam CHANGES from interactive-surface-build: surface_build_intent signature extended, blast_radius 4-kind return shape, composition_config in capabilities, approve_reach as net-new operator-only route, code-edges.json as a new substrate (three corpus layers)
Angle 3: operable-interface-build worktree is 3 commits ahead of main carrying studio + mockups, and REMOVES CognitionView.tsx (214 lines) — flagged as the primary merge risk
A 'Structure Implications' punch-list of surfaces/seams to ADD to the pack (10 items) and contracts that CHANGED (3 items)
Names the mode-dial unification as the single most structurally consequential pending work, with a concrete risk for Claude Design
Closes with a cross-reference map of what exists where vs what is missing/needs-addition

NOTE: states CognitionView.tsx is a new FE region added by the cognition merge and depends on cognition.* SSE — this contradicts the sibling fe-structure.md read (same date) which says CognitionView.tsx does not exist on disk
standouts: The mode-dial unification (MODE_SPECS + THOUGHT_SHAPES as two halves of one dial on the same 8 modes) named as 'the integration (the real prize)' and the biggest reshape to watch
The three corpus layers distinction: code-symbols.json (UI→code), code-edges.json (code→code structural), vectors/ (code→code semantic)
Consent-time resolution property (X3/X5): R2 gather happens AT MINT so the surfaced record is exactly what the build later composes from
blast_radius 4-kind return contract: co_reference / structural_dependents / structural_dependencies / semantic_neighbours
conventions: Honest-correction discipline: explicitly overrides its own prior inventory rather than silently revising
Cites commit SHAs and merge-commit messages as ground truth (stat+log first, then bounded diffs)
Distinguishes ADDITIONS from CHANGES-to-existing-contracts — a seam-aware framing
Reference-don't-duplicate posture: repeatedly tells the pack to reference already-written docs (BACKEND-SEAM-PACK, AUTHORING-FE-HANDOFF) not re-characterize
concerns: Internal cross-file tension visible from this file alone: it asserts CognitionView.tsx exists as a merged FE region, but is part of a corpus whose fe-structure.md (same read date) asserts it does NOT exist on disk — the file does not reconcile this
Status labels rest on read-time diffs (2026-06-08); the worktree merge-risk and 'not yet on main' claims are time-sensitive and may have shifted
notes: If briefing someone: this is the delta report proving two big branches are now merged into one main, cataloguing every new file/route/SSE/seam-change they brought, and handing the design pack a precise add-list — with the mode-dial unification flagged as the next big surface change to design around.
questions: Does CognitionView.tsx actually exist? This file says it was added by the merge; the sibling fe-structure.md says it is absent — which is correct as of the read?
Has the operable-interface-build worktree (3 commits ahead, removing CognitionView.tsx) since been merged or abandoned?
Has the mode-dial unification (MODE_SPECS + THOUGHT_SHAPES) been performed since this read?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it sets out to report the branch-merge delta and reshape implications for the pack, and delivers a thorough file-level + seam-level + punch-list account.
apparent_themes: merge/integration delta tracking against commit ground truth
consent-time resolution as a trust property
intention_signals: Trying to give the design pack an accurate, evidence-grounded picture of what the merged main actually contains and which contracts shifted, so downstream design work targets the real surface — and to flag the mode-dial unification as a near-term restructuring that design must not build against prematurely.
novelty: The explicit naming of the mode-dial as built twice and its unification as a deferred 'prize', plus the three-corpus-layers taxonomy and the consent-time-mint trust property, are distinctive structural insights surfaced by this read.
contribution: Contributes the merged-main delta ledger and the pack's add/change punch-list — the catalogue of new routes (approve-reach, stale-at, ref-versions, journey, self-changes-at), the cognition.* SSE lifecycle, the blast_radius 4-kind shape, the three corpus layers, and the named pending mode-dial unification — which a fused system would keep as the record of what the unified backend exposes and what is still converging.
summary_for_embedding: A branch-merge delta report documenting how the now-merged concurrent-cognition and interactive-surface-build branches reshaped unified main — new runtime/FE files, cognition.* SSE, X1-X17 address→scope→build chain, blast_radius 4-kind shape, three corpus layers, new operator routes — plus a punch-list of additions for the design pack and the pending mode-dial unification.
intention_for_embedding: To give the Claude Design pack an evidence-grounded account of what merged main actually contains and which seams changed, so design targets the real backend surface and accounts for the near-term mode-dial unification.
